purpose: A flexbox layout primitive with configurable direction, wrap, and alignment. Base class of HBox and VBox. Use directly when children need to reflow (wrap) or when direction changes at runtime.
whenToUse: Row of items that should wrap to multiple lines when space is tight
Layout where direction changes (row on desktop, column on mobile)
Compose responsive card grids without a full ResponsiveGridLayout
As a flexible container for custom composite layouts
whenNotToUse: For a fixed horizontal row — use HBox (simpler)
For a fixed vertical column — use VBox (simpler)
For a form column layout — use FormContainer
For a strict grid — use Grid or ResponsiveGridLayout
doRules: Set wrap='Wrap' when children should reflow
Set alignItems and justifyContent for controlled positioning
dontRules: Do not use FlexBox with wrap=NoWrap when children exceed width — they'll overflow
Do not nest FlexBoxes deeply — flatten when possible
Do not use for form-field alignment — use FormContainer
Do not mix with absolute-positioned children

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside pages, panels, cards, custom composites
layoutGuidance.sizing: Configurable; may hug content or fill parent
layoutGuidance.alignment: direction + justifyContent + alignItems + wrap control layout

examples: Row of KPI tiles that wraps to next line on narrow viewport

responsiveBehavior.S: May reflow to column if direction switches

requirements: role='group' when children share purpose; otherwise none
Focus order follows visual order per current direction
Content reflows without horizontal scroll at 320px
Children provide their own accessible names
